channel.title: Solid State Ionics
channel.description: Filtered papers from Solid State Ionics

item.title: Oxide Ion Conductivity and Oxygen Vacancy Diffusion Coefficient of Stabilized Zirconia and Doped Ceria Based on Classical Defect Chemistry with Particular Focus on the Valence State (2+, 3+, and 4+) of Dopant Cations
item.description:
Publication date: 1 August 2026

Source: Solid State Ionics, Volume 442

Author(s): Junichiro Mizusaki

item.title: Quasi-Solid-State Hybrid Electrolyte with Three-Dimensional Ion Transport Channel for Solid State Sodium Metal Batteries Constructed by One-Step Molding Template Method
item.description:
Publication date: 1 September 2026

Source: Solid State Ionics, Volume 443

Author(s): Guoqiang Li, Shixin Xiao, Meihua Liu

item.title: Freeze-Drying-Induced Crystallinity Suppression in PEO-Based Solid Polymer Electrolytes for Enhanced Li-Ion Transport
item.description:
Publication date: 1 August 2026

Source: Solid State Ionics, Volume 442

Author(s): Yu hyeon Song, Su Yeon Park, Joon-Hyuk Yim, Jae-won Lee
